summary: Comprehensive E2E testing of Ghiras Club Student Points Management System completed successfully. All backend APIs (20 tests) and frontend UI components working correctly. Key features tested: Dashboard with supervisor groupings, Student public pages, Points modal, QR codes modal, Challenges management, Ramadan quiz status, CRUD operations.
critical_code_review_comments: CSS template literal fix verified - supervisor colors now properly render with dynamic classes
Lite mode for /api/students endpoint correctly excludes image_url for performance
RTL direction properly applied throughout the app
Arabic text rendering correctly with proper connected letters

test_credentials.note: No authentication required - auth was removed

seed_data_creation: 30 existing students with real data, Test created TEST_ prefixed students/challenges during pytest (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working. Dashboard at / loads students grouped by supervisor (4 groups: أبي محمد القحطاني, أنس السعدي, أبو غيث, أسامة خالد). Student public page at /public/:studentId shows profile, rank, top 10, quiz status. Challenges page at /challenges works. Ramadan quiz shows 'completed' status (quiz ended). QR codes modal generates QR for each student. Points modal has positive/negative/custom tabs with predefined options.

frontend_ui_tests: ✓ Dashboard loads with header 'نادي غِراس'
✓ Add student button visible
✓ Challenges link visible
✓ QR codes button visible
✓ 4 supervisor group sections displayed
✓ Statistics cards visible (30 students, 12113 total points, 4 supervisors)
✓ Leaderboard ticker with top 3 podium visible
✓ RTL direction properly set
✓ Supervisor color styling applied (CSS template literals fixed)
✓ QR codes modal opens with student QR codes
✓ Points modal opens with 3 tabs (positive/negative/custom)
✓ Points options visible (attendance, project, delay, absence)
✓ Custom points form with input and reason fields
✓ Add student modal with name/phone/supervisor/image fields
✓ Student public page loads with profile data
✓ Rank badge and points display visible
✓ Ramadan quiz section shows completed status
✓ Top 10 leaderboard visible on public page
✓ QR code toggle button works
✓ Share link section visible
✓ Challenges page loads with add challenge modal

key_verifications.css_template_literals_fixed: Supervisor group cards now properly display dynamic color classes (border-blue-500, bg-blue-50, etc.)
key_verifications.lite_mode_working: GET /api/students?lite=true returns students without image_url field
key_verifications.arabic_rtl_rendering: Arabic text renders correctly with proper RTL layout and connected letters
key_verifications.ramadan_quiz_status: Returns 'completed' status as expected since quiz ended (day > 15)
